title: deschampsia cespitosa var. mackenzieana
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa var. mackenzieana, commonly known as blue oat grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, and is believed to have a soothing effect on the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of blue oat grass include reducing inflammation and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Blue oat grass is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can be used externally to treat skin irritations and wounds, or taken internally to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
